utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Everything on your application looks really good ... Ohh !

emotion_cause.span: 1_Everything on your application looks really good

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Just one last question umm , are you and your friends gonna be over here all the time like partying and hanging out ?

utterances.speaker: The Potential Roommate
utterances.text: Oh do not worry , I am not really a party girl .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Whoa ! ! Now look , do not be just blurtin stuff out . I want you to really think about your answers . Okay ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_Oh do not worry , I am not really a party girl .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You can call off the roommate search ! Hi ! I will be living here .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh do not listen to him , he is just some guy who really wants the apartment , but I do not think he is gonna get it .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Why did you take the shower curtain down ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_Why did you take the shower curtain down ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That thing was a hazard ! I am very safety conscious .
